title: leontodon cichoriaceus
intro: Leontodon cichoriaceus, also known as Hawkbit or Wild Hawk's Beard, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and inflammation, as well as aiding in digestion and detoxification. Leontodon cichoriaceus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some herbalists also using it in salves and ointments for topical applications.
